strengths: Extensive production experience with high-performance, event-driven systems handling real-time data at scale (e.g., micro-services infrastructure at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second)
Direct contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows (re:cinq)
Strong leadership in technical excellence through software craftsmanship practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital) and mentorship through workshops and courses
concerns: Limited explicit fintech experience (e.g., credit systems, payment flows) though background in high-stakes commercial environments and algorithmic optimization exists
No direct experience with regulated financial environments or multi-jurisdictional compliance infrastructure
Background is heavily weighted toward general software engineering rather than specialized AI/ML leadership, though agentic AI contributions are emerging
response.justification: Bogdan’s resume demonstrates deep technical leadership in building and scaling high-performance, event-driven systems with real-time data processing, a critical foundation for agentic AI architectures and fintech infrastructure. His hands-on contributions to AI-agent tooling and frameworks at re:cinq, combined with his disciplined engineering practices (e.g., TDD, CI/CD), align closely with the CTO role’s requirements. While fintech-specific experience is lighter, his ability to rapidly master complex domains and his focus on testable, scalable systems suggest high upside for adapting to regulated AI-native fintech environments.
